name: Deep-Dish Nectarine Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Slice the nectarines into about 6 cups.
3. Combine the flour, sugar, cinnamon, salt, and lemon peel in a bowl. Mix lightly with the nectarines.
4. Roll half of the pastry dough to fit into a deep 9-inch pie plate.
5. Spoon the nectarine mixture into the crust. Dot with butter.
6. Roll out the remaining pastry dough and place it over the fruit, trimming any excess.
7. Crimp the edges to seal well.
8. Cut slits in the top to allow steam to escape. Sprinkle with sugar.
9. Bake for 45 minutes or until nicely browned.
